articles.title: ORANGEKLOUD TECHNOLOGY (ORKT) Stock News
articles.summary: This page provides news and insights on ORANGEKLOUD TECHNOLOGY (ORKT), a Singapore-based software company focusing on AI-driven no-code application development. Recent news highlights include strategic partnerships for AI-powered SME digital transformation, updates on a proposed merger with VeVe, and regaining compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements. The company also announced the launch of its eMOBIQ® AI platform and various strategic collaborations and contracts aimed at expanding its AI and no-code solutions.

articles.title: How Investors Are Reacting To FactSet (FDS) Partnering With Valutico On Private-Market Valuation Workflows
articles.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. announced a partnership with Valutico to streamline private-market valuation workflows, integrating Valutico's tools and FactSet's market data with its Cobalt platform. This collaboration aims to consolidate fragmented processes into a single system, providing more frequent and robust portfolio valuations for private-market investors. While the partnership strengthens FactSet's offering, the immediate investment narrative is also influenced by its recent dividend increase and ongoing challenges like mixed capital market conditions and rising tech costs.

articles.title: Assessing Revvity (RVTY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
articles.summary: Revvity (RVTY) has experienced recent share price weakness, with the stock down 2.5% over the past day and 7% over the past week, prompting a re-evaluation of its valuation. While Simply Wall St's narrative suggests the stock is 21.4% undervalued with a fair value of $119.56 due to expected margin expansion and a shift towards higher-margin offerings, its current P/E ratio is significantly above fair value and industry averages. Investors are encouraged to consider both the discounted cash flow model suggesting a 31.8% discount and the high P/E ratio when making decisions.

articles.title: American Tower Corp stock (US0304201033): 2026 dividend plans and tower portfolio in focus
articles.summary: American Tower Corp (AMT) has updated its 2026 outlook, affirming its REIT dividend profile and expanding its global tower footprint. The company, an independent owner of wireless communication towers, focuses on long-term lease contracts with mobile network operators, leveraging its REIT status to distribute a significant portion of its taxable income as dividends. Its strategy includes geographic diversification and adaptation to 5G deployments and 4G densification, which drive demand for its infrastructure.

articles.title: Delta Air Lines: Strong Demand Offsets Part Of Fuel Inflation (NYSE:DAL)
articles.summary: Delta Air Lines delivered strong Q1 results, exceeding revenue and margin expectations, and is considered undervalued. articles.title: Ecolab stock (US2788651006): insider buying and business momentum draw attention
articles.summary: Ecolab (ECL) shares are gaining attention due to recent insider buying in May 2026 and its strong positioning in the water, hygiene, and energy-efficiency markets, particularly in the US. The company's business model, focused on recurring demand and operational efficiency for diverse sectors like healthcare and food service, makes it a proxy for several key end markets. While insider purchases don't alter fundamentals, they signal internal confidence, with investors also monitoring the company's global footprint and strategies for growth amidst competitive and economic shifts.
